stars.description: Collect, review, and upload redacted pi session files to a Hugging Face dataset
stars.scoreReason: Low relevance (not frontier AI, appears to be data collection tooling), moderate freshness (young repo with modest stars), moderate concreteness (specific technical implementation described)
